summary: Multiple service disruptions detected across key APIs, resulting in increased response times and errors over a 2-hour period on October 15, 2023.

anomaly_details.description: Response time exceeded the threshold of 300ms for 95th percentile.
Spike in error rate for /api/orders endpoint reaching 15%.
Increase in CPU utilization above 85% on node-web-service.

candidate_root_cause_hypotheses: Recent deployment of version 2.3 introduced performance regressions.
Database connectivity issues leading to increased latency in service calls.
Unexpected traffic surge causing resource exhaustion on the application server.
